text:
Trade (, rom. Torēdo) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to randomly swap a card from their own card binder with the target player's binder.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows the player to randomly swap a card from their binder with the target player's binder. It has the ability to swap a card located anywhere in the player's binder. Of course, since this is random swap, the user could end up being worse-off because of the trade. It can only be used in close proximity to the target player.

|-
![Eng]
|No.1008 :: Trade 
1 named player's card and 1 of your own, will randomly exchange places.
|}
